title: Closing The Loop On REIT Prices And Discount Rates

title: AvalonBay Gives You Value, Growth, And Income
text: AvalonBay Communities is a viable choice for conservative investors seeking value, income, and long-term growth in the real estate market. AVB has consistently generated top and bottom line growth over the past 10 years and is well-positioned in a tight housing market with limited new supply. Meanwhile, it's seeing robust operating fundamentals in the near term and has the backing of a strong balance sheet.
